mnemosyne/server:latest\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Authentication"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["All endpoints require an API key via the MNEMOSYNE_API_KEYS=key1,key2,key3\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Endpoints"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Health Check"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"GET /health\n\n# 128,\n}\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Remember"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"POST /remember\nContent-Type: application/json\n\n{\n\"content\": \"User prefers dark \"2026-04-25T14:30:00Z\"\n}\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Update Memory"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"PUT /memory/{id}\nContent-Type: application/json\n\n{\n\"content\":
